overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a moody, atmospheric forest environment at dusk. The character passes a rustic thatched-roof hut, continues along a winding dirt trail through dense woodland, and ascends ancient stone stairs leading to overgrown ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural homestead with thatched-roof hut and wooden structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily past the wooden hut, heading toward the forest path

entered.detail: rustic wooden building with straw roof and open doorway
piles of cut timber stacked near the hut
round wooden barrels placed near the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens near a rustic thatched-roof hut in a clearing. Geralt walks along a dirt path past wooden carts, stacked logs, and barrels. The environment is dimly lit with a cool, atmospheric tone typical of a forest at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through dense woodland

events.description: leaving the open homestead area and entering the enclosed forest path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow dirt path surrounded by tall trees and thick undergrowth

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees forming a dense canopy
thick grass and bushes lining the trail
large moss-covered boulders emerging from the vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open homestead into a narrow, enclosed forest trail. Tall trees block most of the sky, creating a dim, atmospheric environment. The path winds through dense vegetation with occasional rock outcroppings visible among the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with scattered boulders approaching ancient ruins

events.description: trail becomes rockier with large boulders and stone markers appearing alongside the path

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path as larger rock formations become prominent and ancient stone structures appear in the distance

entered.detail: massive moss-covered rocks lining the trail
weathered stone columns marking the entrance to ruins
wide stone staircase leading upward to the ruins

segments.scene_description: The forest trail continues with increasingly prominent rock formations. Large boulders line the path as the character approaches ancient stone pillars and a staircase in the distance, signaling the transition from natural forest to man-made ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairway leading to overgrown ruins

events.description: arriving at the stone staircase and beginning ascent to the ruins
transitioning from walking on dirt to climbing stone steps

agents.ego_description: climbing the weathered stone stairs toward the ruin entrance, flanked by ornate stone pillars

entered.detail: carved stone balustrades lining the staircase
gothic stone archway at the top of the stairs
ancient stone structures covered in moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at an ancient stone staircase flanked by weathered pillars and carved railings. Ascending the steps, the scene opens to reveal overgrown ruins with a gothic archway at the summit, marking the transition from forest trail to ancient architectural site.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rustic forest homestead into the depths of a dense woodland and finally ascends toward ancient stone ruins. It begins in a dimly lit clearing near a thatched-roof hut, moving past wooden carts and stacked logs along a cool, atmospheric dirt path. As the character leaves the homestead, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed forest trail where tall trees block the sky and dense vegetation crowds the winding way. The path then evolves as large boulders and rock formations become more prominent, guiding the camera toward weathered stone pillars in the distance. Finally, the movement culminates in the ascent of an ancient stone staircase, passing carved railings to reveal overgrown ruins and a gothic archway at the summit.
